failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, so the agent could not obtain the catalog evidence needed to answer the count question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent correctly understood the user goal and followed the required plan: use ProductCatalogSearch to count available Mechanical Keyboard products. The tool invocation arguments were well-formed and matched the plan. The first failure is the tool result at index 3, which explicitly reports a CatalogServiceTimeoutError: the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is an infrastructure/connectivity failure, not a schema error, guardrail block, hallucination, or intent mismatch. The error was not resolved later; the Executor and Evaluator simply propagated the inability to complete the task.
